summary: Bottom Sheet Notification System - ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified: 1) Error notification (red) appears with wrong PIN, has X dismiss button, does NOT auto-dismiss, 2) Login with correct PIN works, 3) Tables page loads with categories and products, 4) No 'toast.' references in OrderScreen.js, 5) BottomSheetNotification component properly imported in App.js, 6) Dismiss button works correctly, 7) Only sonner.jsx and KitchenTV.js import from sonner (KitchenTV is a separate standalone page), 8) App compiles and loads without errors.

tests.name: Error notification with wrong PIN
tests.details: Red bottom sheet appeared with 'PIN incorrecto' message

tests.name: Error notification has dismiss button
tests.details: X button (data-testid='notify-dismiss-btn') present on error notification

tests.name: Error notification does NOT auto-dismiss
tests.details: Waited 4.5 seconds, notification remained visible (correct behavior)

tests.name: Dismiss button works
tests.details: Clicking X button dismissed the error notification

tests.name: Login with correct PIN
tests.details: Successfully logged in with PIN 10000, redirected to dashboard

tests.name: Navigate to Mesas
tests.details: Table map loaded with all tables visible

tests.name: Categories and products visible
tests.details: Found HAMBURGUESA and CERVEZAS categories with products

tests.name: No toast references in OrderScreen
tests.details: grep confirmed no 'toast.' references in OrderScreen.js

tests.name: BottomSheetNotification in App.js
tests.details: Imported on line 5, rendered on line 80

tests.name: Sonner imports check
tests.details: Only sonner.jsx and KitchenTV.js import from sonner. KitchenTV is a standalone page with its own Toaster.

features: Error (red): manual dismiss only, no auto-dismiss
Confirm: dark overlay with Cancelar/Confirmar buttons
iOS safe area support via env(safe-area-inset-bottom)
Keyboard Escape to dismiss (except confirm type)

notify.js.pattern: Global event emitter (no React context needed)

critical_code_review_comments: KitchenTV.js still imports Toaster from sonner - this is acceptable as it's a standalone display page that doesn't use the main App.js layout
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bottom sheet notification system fully implemented and working. All toast.success/error/warning/info calls replaced with notify.* across ~45 files. BottomSheetNotification component renders at fixed bottom with z-index 99999. Error notifications require manual dismiss (X button), success/warning/info auto-dismiss. KitchenTV.js is a standalone page that still uses its own Toaster from sonner (acceptable).
